meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Claude Code Setup to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. A high-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting cryptic stack traces. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous agent that reads your entire codebase, identifies root causes, and implements fixes in real-time. This workflow reduces debugging time by 70%, allowing you to focus on feature delivery and high-value client architecture.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. You’ve been staring at a recursive bug for three hours, and the cognitive load is starting to crush your velocity. This is the silent killer of freelance careers: spending more time chasing ghosts in your own logic than actually shipping profitable features.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By weaponizing Claude Code, you transform your CLI into a senior-level partner that doesn't just suggest fixes—it executes them. We’re moving beyond simple chat interfaces into an autonomous agentic workflow that treats your repository as a living, breathing system.

steps.title: Initialize Repository Context
steps.description: Before debugging, Claude Code needs a clear mental model of your project architecture and dependency tree.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure. Identify the entry point, main dependency file, and common patterns in the codebase to prepare for deep debugging.

steps.title: Isolate the Error Domain
steps.description: Don't feed the agent the whole project. Target the specific module where the crash occurs to maintain token efficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the error log in [file_path] and suggest the most likely culprit based on the stack trace.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file [file_path] --task 'Identify root cause of the error in this file'

steps.title: Execute Automated Unit Testing
steps.description: Force the agent to write a failing test case that reproduces the bug before attempting any code changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reproduction script in Vitest/Jest that triggers the reported bug reliably.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create reproduction test and verify it fails'

steps.title: Apply Surgical Patching
steps.description: Instruct the agent to modify only the necessary lines, maintaining existing code style and performance benchmarks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a fix for the identified bug. Ensure the solution is non-breaking and follows our existing design patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Fix the bug and ensure the test passes'

steps.title: Verify Regression and Cleanup
steps.description: Finalize the fix by running the full suite and ensuring no side effects were introduced elsewhere.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite. If all pass, confirm the stability of the fix and suggest any necessary refactors.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Run all tests and finalize fix'

pro_tips: Always use 'claude --config' to set specific coding standards (e.g., 'Always use functional programming patterns') to ensure consistent output quality.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' manifests before starting a session to keep Claude focused on specific architectural goals.
Pipe your local test logs directly into the Claude terminal session using shell redirection to bypass manual copy-pasting.
When debugging complex state, ask Claude to visualize the state flow as a Mermaid diagram before it suggests a code change.
Rotate your API keys every 30 days and use environment-specific config files to prevent accidental deployment of debug-heavy configurations.
content.next_steps: Once your debugging workflow is automated, move on to implementing CI/CD triggers that automatically run Claude Code on failed test builds.
content.conversion_block: You now have the power to turn debugging into a competitive advantage. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
